description: launchPublishedWorkflowRun creates run with engine='temporal' with no env flags set
launchPublishedWorkflowRun creates run with engine='temporal' even when WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_TEMPORAL_POLLING=false is present in the environment
launchPublishedWorkflowRun calls startWorkflowRuntimeV2TemporalRun and persists temporal_workflow_id/temporal_run_id
Temporal start failure marks the run FAILED with stage='launch' and rethrows (toast path preserved)
startRun writes engine='temporal'; StartRunParams no longer accepts an engine value (type-level)
Producer client.workflow.start uses the contract task-queue constant
Temporal worker polls the contract task-queue constant even when WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE is set in the environment
repo grep: no references to WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE outside the contract constant
worker index startup: Temporal worker starts with no flags set
worker index startup: Temporal worker starts even with WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_TEMPORAL_POLLING=false in env
worker index startup: no DB poller is constructed or started under any env combination
repo compiles with both WorkflowRuntimeV2Worker files deleted (no dangling imports)
data-store sweep module deletes expired workflow_data_store rows on its interval
data-store sweep starts with the worker service and stops cleanly on shutdown
health endpoint reports temporal, eventStream, and dataStoreSweep workers; no dbPolling key
POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/retry returns 404 (route deleted)
POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/resume returns 404 (route deleted)
POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/requeue returns 404 (route deleted)
actions module no longer exports retry/resume/requeue actions or the legacy-control guards (type-level/grep)
cancelWorkflowRunAction cancels a Temporal run via handle.cancel and updates run status
cancelWorkflowRunAction surfaces a clear error when the Temporal cancel fails
resumeWorkflowRunFromQuotaPauseAction signals quota resume for any run (no engine branch)
submitWorkflowEventAction signals every matched run (no engine filter)
event stream worker signals event waits for matched runs without checking engine
event stream worker still launches new runs for event-triggered workflows end to end
quota resume scan handler signals Temporal for due quota waits (no executeRun branch)
activities module no longer exports executeWorkflowRuntimeV2Run
WorkflowRuntimeV2 class exposes startRun but not executeRun/acquireRunnableRun/resumeRunFromEvent/resumeRunFromTimeout
child-run launch via startWorkflowRuntimeV2ChildRun still creates and executes a child Temporal run
manual run via startWorkflowRunAction executes end to end on the Temporal stack (steps appear, run succeeds)
run studio renders snapshots for a pre-cutover run with snapshot rows (historical read path intact)
bulk run delete and tenant deletion still clean up workflow_run_snapshots
run details panel renders no Retry button for FAILED runs
run details panel renders no Resume button for WAITING runs (quota-pause resume UI unaffected)
run details panel renders no Requeue Event button for runs with event waits
Replay with unedited payload sends no payload field to replayWorkflowRunAction
replayWorkflowRunAction without payload uses the original input_json (not the redacted copy)
Replay with edited payload sends exactly the edited JSON as the override
Replay with invalid edited JSON shows the validation toast and does not call the action
Replay success navigates to /msp/workflows/runs/<newRunId>
Replay failure keeps the operator on the original run with an error toast
banner shows for RUNNING run with zero steps older than 60s
banner absent for RUNNING run younger than 60s
banner absent once the run has any step rows
banner absent for WAITING/SUCCEEDED/FAILED/CANCELED runs regardless of steps
migration cancels a RUNNING engine='db' run: status CANCELED, completed_at set, error_json explains cutover
migration cancels a WAITING engine=null run and resolves its open workflow_run_waits
migration leaves terminal db-engine runs untouched
migration leaves RUNNING engine='temporal' runs untouched
docker-compose.ee.yaml alone brings up Temporal + worker; manual run executes end to end
docker-compose.temporal.ee.yaml no longer exists; docs/scripts don't reference it
playwright workflow suite passes against the Temporal-backed deps compose
repo grep: zero matches for WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_ anywhere
db reference workflow test file deleted; CI passes without it
e2e suite covers run start, event wait + signal, time wait, child run, cancel on the Temporal path
control integration suite retains Temporal control cases (cancel, quota resume, submit event) and passes
publish integration suite passes without executeRun/acquireRunnableRun usage
launcher unit tests assert temporal launch with flags absent and with stale flags present
full typecheck and lint pass across server, shared, ee packages, services
cutover support-posture doc reflects engine removal (no references to enabling DB polling as a remediation)
